ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "controller" TEXT /* Controller associated with the route */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action associated with the route */,
  "template" TEXT /* Template used for rendering the route */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the route is active */,
  "require_authentication" INTEGER /* Indicates if the route requires user authentication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the route */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the route */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the route */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES actions ("action_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_controller FOREIGN KEY ("controller") REFERENCES controllers ("controller_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_template FOREIGN KEY ("template") REFERENCES templates ("template_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "controllers" (
  "controller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each controller */,
  "controller_name" TEXT /* Name of the controller */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the controller is active */,
  "require_authentication" INTEGER /* Indicates if the controller requires user authentication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the controller */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the controller */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the controller */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the controller */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the controller was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the controller was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("controller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "controller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the controller the action belongs to */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action is active */,
  "require_authentication" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action requires user authentication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the action */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_controller_id FOREIGN KEY ("controller_id") REFERENCES controllers ("controller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the template file */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is active */,
  "require_authentication" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template requires user authentication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the template */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, user) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for secure storage */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the route */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the route was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the route */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the route */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the route request in milliseconds */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a route */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the route */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the route in this version */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route in this version */,
  "controller" TEXT /* Controller associated with the route in this version */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action associated with the route in this version */,
  "template" TEXT /* Template used for rendering the route in this version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_versions_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a template */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template in this version */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the template file in this version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_versions_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can view the route */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can edit the route */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_permissions_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
